reason: The exact contract being changed: buffered container invoke, data-client read timeout, 15-min sync boundary. Streaming must extend this spec.
Exactly-once turn persistence + short/long-term restore hook must be preserved inside the new streaming entrypoint.
Documents the SSE flattening (flatten_sse_text) for streaming runtimes — the buffered-consumer fallback the container frame shape must stay compatible with.
Container (方式A) is eval-supported; confirms eval invokes via rt.invoke_runtime_text (SSE-safe) so the streamed frames must not break eval.
